name: AU Altura Plus Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all purchases
4X Reward Points (8 RP per ₹100) on dining transactions
4X Reward Points (8 RP per ₹100) on travel bookings

cappedCategories.description: 4X accelerated rewards capped at 5,000 bonus RP per month

welcomeBenefits.description: 1,000 bonus Reward Points on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver + 2,500 bonus Reward Points

additionalBenefits: 4X accelerated rewards on dining and travel
8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹200 per month
EMI conversion facility on large purchases
pros: Good 4X rewards on dining and travel categories
8 domestic lounge visits per year at a ₹999 fee point
Easy annual fee waiver at ₹2L spend threshold
Welcome bonus of 1,000 RP on activation
Fuel surcharge waiver saves on fuel purchases
cons: Low base earn rate of 2 RP per ₹100 (0.5% return)
3.5% foreign currency markup is not competitive
idealFor: Frequent diners and travellers looking for accelerated rewards
Users who want domestic lounge access at an affordable fee
Mid-income earners seeking a well-rounded rewards card

faqs.question: How do 4X rewards on dining and travel work?
faqs.answer: Instead of the base 2 RP per ₹100, you earn 8 RP per ₹100 on dining and travel transactions. At ₹0.25 per point, that's 2% return on these categories compared to 0.5% base return.

faqs.question: How can I access domestic airport lounges?
faqs.answer: You get 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year via Dreamfolks or Visa lounge network. Simply swipe your AU Altura Plus card at participating lounge reception desks.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee easily waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, spending ₹2,00,000 in a year waives the ₹999 annual fee. This averages to about ₹16,667 per month, which is achievable for most mid-income users.

faqs.question: Can I convert purchases to EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can convert large purchases into easy EMIs at competitive interest rates through the AU 0101 app or by contacting customer service.
